prose: No frontier-orbitals calculation was run, so there is no computed HOMO/LUMO value to report. I previously asked for confirmation of the charge and multiplicity because they were not specified; without those inputs I cannot run the DFT calculation under the required reporting rules. Requested method, if confirmed and run, would be DFT B3LYP/def2-TZVP, tier `standard`, gas phase, on `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/furan/furan.xyz`. Engine integrity.trustworthy verdict: not available because no chemkit computation was executed. Warnings: none returned because no chemkit computation was executed.
